s-1.ptxt: INSPECT PARK/NEUTRAL POSITION SWITCH ASSEMBLY OPERATION

s2.ptxt: Depress the brake pedal and check that the engine starts when the shift lever is set in the N or P position, but does not start in other positions.

Check that the back-up light comes on and the reverse warning buzzer sounds when the shift lever is set in the R position, but the light and buzzer do not operate in other positions. If a failure is found, check the park/neutral position switch for continuity.
